name: Donna's Beer Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F and prepare the pans.
2. Measure the dry ingredients into a bowl and pour the beer over, stirring to combine.
3. Spoon the batter into the prepared pans and brush the tops with butter.
4. Bake for 15-20 minutes. Makes 9 large muffins.
5. Serve hot; a little grated cheddar cheese may be sprinkled on top before baking if desired.
